title: pilea angolensis subsp. angolensis
intro: Pilea angolensis subsp. angolensis, also known as the copper leaf or aluminium plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be used to make herbal teas or salves.
